description: State document, in Arabic script. Most probably an internal correspondence. Mentions a Qāḍī Ḥammād b, ʿAlī and also Amīr al-Muʾminīn in l4. Reused for Hebrew piyyūt on the recto. Requires further examination.
tags: Arabic reused, Qadi, Petition, Fatimid, DIMME
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
